about.label: Who We Are
about.title:
Your Smile is
Our Mission
about.intro1: Ibtiseme Tour is an incoming travel agency based in the heart of Istanbul's Beyoglu district. Founded in 2005 and certified by TURSAB (Turkey's Association of Tourist Agencies), we have dedicated two decades to welcoming international visitors — treating every traveler as a valued guest, not just a client.
about.intro2: The name "Ibtiseme" means "smile" in Arabic — a reflection of our philosophy and our close ties with the Arabic-speaking world.
about.value1_desc: We embrace the values and ideas of our partners and clients.
about.value2_desc: Management that leads by collaboration, not hierarchy.
about.value3_desc: A dedicated team working with skill and genuine care.
about.value4_desc: Every traveler is treated as a respected guest in our home.
about.value5_desc: Maximum care at every step of the journey.
about.value6_desc: Your happiness is our highest achievement.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title:
Three Pillars of
Expert Service
services.subtitle: We arrange everything from A to Z so international guests can seamlessly arrive and enjoy Turkey.

service1.title: Incoming Tourism & Transportation
service1.desc: From budget-friendly hotel reservations to luxury custom accommodation, we arrange everything you need to travel to Turkey from abroad. We offer 24/7 comfortable transport with chauffeured luxury vehicles or rent-a-car services, alongside private guided tours with expert local guides.
service1.home_desc: Hotel reservations, 24/7 VIP airport transfers, chauffeured vehicles, rent-a-car, and private guided tours across Turkey. Every detail arranged before you land.

service2.title: Medical & Health Tourism
service2.desc: We professionally manage your entire medical journey in collaboration with state-of-the-art hospitals. From initial referrals and certified interpretation to VIP accommodation and recovery, we ensure a seamless and dignified experience.
service2.home_desc: Hospital referrals, certified Arabic interpretation, VIP accompaniment, and recovery stays — we manage your entire medical journey with discretion and care.

service3.title: Corporate Events & MICE
service3.desc: For large-scale corporate organizations and international meetings, we provide A-to-Z professional planning and management. Every detail is meticulously planned to ensure your events are executed flawlessly.
service3.home_desc: A-to-Z professional planning for international meetings, conferences, and corporate events. Flawless execution, VIP protocol, and seamless ground handling.

dest.label: Where We Take You
dest.title:
Discover
Turkey
dest.subtitle: From the vibrant streets of Istanbul to the magical skies of Cappadocia — we know Turkey inside out.

istanbul.desc: Imperial palaces, vibrant bazaars, private Bosphorus cruises, and world-class cuisine. The city where East meets West.

cappadocia.desc: Rise with the sun in a hot air balloon over otherworldly landscapes. Underground cities, cave hotels, and unique scenery.

trabzon.desc: Ancient monasteries, lush highland plateaus, and the dramatic beauty of the Black Sea coast.

antalya.desc: Turquoise waters, ancient Roman ruins, and the finest beaches in Turkey. A perfect blend of history and relaxation on the Mediterranean.

pamukkale.desc: UNESCO World Heritage terraced travertine pools and thermal springs. One of Turkey's most iconic and surreal natural landscapes.

bodrum.desc: The jewel of the Aegean — boutique hotels, vibrant marina, the Castle of St. Peter, and some of Turkey's most glamorous coastline.

more.title: And Many More Destinations
more.desc: From the Aegean coast to Eastern Anatolia, from the Black Sea highlands to the Mediterranean Riviera — we organise trips to every corner of Turkey.

dest_istanbul.hero_sub: Istanbul is not merely a city — it is the place where centuries of civilisation, flavour, and beauty converge into an experience unlike any other on earth.
dest_istanbul.exp_intro: Istanbul rewards curiosity at every turn. Whether it is your first visit or your tenth, the city continues to surprise — with hidden courtyards, rooftop panoramas, and stories layered across three thousand years of history.
dest_istanbul.exp_text1: Walk through the corridors of Topkapi Palace and feel the weight of an Ottoman empire that once stretched across three continents. Step inside Hagia Sophia — a building that has been a church, a mosque, and a symbol of civilisation itself — and understand why people travel from every corner of the world to stand beneath its dome.
dest_istanbul.exp_text2: Then lose yourself in the Grand Bazaar: 4,000 shops, centuries of trade, and an atmosphere that is alive with colour, scent, and negotiation. End the evening on the Bosphorus — where the lights of two continents shimmer across the water — and understand why Istanbul is, without question, one of the greatest cities on earth.
dest_istanbul.exp_text3: At Ibtiseme Tour, we arrange every element of your Istanbul experience — private guides, VIP transfers, curated restaurant reservations, and exclusive access — so you can simply arrive and be amazed.
dest_istanbul.hl_c1_desc: Topkapi Palace, Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque, Dolmabahçe — history you can walk through, not just read about.
dest_istanbul.hl_c2_desc: Sail the strait that divides two continents. A private yacht at sunset, with Istanbul's skyline glowing on both shores.
dest_istanbul.hl_c3_desc: The world's oldest covered market. Jewellery, spices, carpets, leather, and Turkish delights — a sensory world of its own.
dest_istanbul.hl_c4_desc: From traditional Ottoman mezes to Michelin-worthy rooftop restaurants overlooking the Bosphorus — Istanbul is a food lover's paradise.
dest_istanbul.hl_c5_desc: Five-star hotels with Bosphorus views, boutique palaces in Sultanahmet, and exclusive suites — we arrange the finest options for you.
dest_istanbul.hl_c6_desc: Your dedicated Ibtiseme Tour contact is always available on WhatsApp — before, during, and after your stay in Istanbul.
dest_istanbul.cta_title:
Let Us Plan Your
Perfect Istanbul Journey
dest_istanbul.cta_desc: Tell us what you're looking for — and we'll craft an experience that goes beyond expectations. No templates. No compromises. Just Istanbul, arranged exactly the way you deserve.

dest_cappadocia.hero_sub: There are few places on earth that look like nothing else — Cappadocia is one of them. A landscape born from ancient volcanic eruptions and sculpted by wind into something almost impossible to believe.
dest_cappadocia.exp_intro: Cappadocia defies ordinary description. Its towering rock formations — called fairy chimneys — rise from the valley floors like sentinels from another age.
dest_cappadocia.exp_text1: Beneath your feet, entire cities were carved from the soft volcanic tuff thousands of years ago, sheltering civilisations from invaders and harsh winters alike. Today it offers some of Turkey's most coveted luxury accommodations — cave suites with private terraces overlooking the rose valley, gourmet dining by candlelight deep within ancient stone.
dest_cappadocia.exp_text2: The incomparable experience of drifting above it all in a hot air balloon as the first light of dawn turns the landscape gold is something that stays with a person for a lifetime. Ibtiseme Tour curates every detail — from private transfers and exclusive balloon flight reservations to VIP cave hotel suites and guided tours with expert local historians.
dest_cappadocia.hl_c1_desc: Drift silently above the valleys as the sun rises, painting the chimneys in shades of amber and rose. One of the most breathtaking spectacles on the planet — best witnessed from the sky.
dest_cappadocia.hl_c2_desc: Wander through Göreme, Ihlara, and the Rose Valley — formations that appear sculpted by imagination rather than nature. Each valley reveals a new palette, a new silence, a new wonder.
dest_cappadocia.hl_c3_desc: Descend into Derinkuyu or Kaymakli — ancient subterranean labyrinths carved up to 85 metres deep, capable of sheltering thousands. A feat of human ingenuity that still astounds historians today.
dest_cappadocia.hl_c4_desc: Sleep inside a centuries-old volcanic rock suite, complete with all modern luxury. Private jacuzzis carved from stone, panoramic valley terraces, and an intimacy with history that no conventional hotel can offer.
dest_cappadocia.hl_c5_desc: A UNESCO World Heritage Site containing rock-cut churches and monasteries adorned with Byzantine frescoes dating back to the 10th century. History preserved in perfect, breathtaking detail.
dest_cappadocia.hl_c6_desc: Known as Imagination Valley, Devrent hosts formations shaped like animals and mythical figures. Nearby Pasabag is famed for its towering mushroom-shaped chimneys — surreal, otherworldly, unforgettable.
dest_cappadocia.cta_title:
Let Us Plan Your
Perfect Cappadocia Journey
dest_cappadocia.cta_desc: Our specialists are standing by to craft your bespoke Cappadocia experience — from exclusive balloon flight bookings to handpicked cave suites and private guided tours through the valleys.

dest_bodrum.hero_sub: Bodrum is where Turkey's most glamorous coastline meets centuries of maritime history. A place where luxury yachts glide past ancient castles, and every sunset feels like it was designed for you.
dest_bodrum.exp_intro: Bodrum commands the southwestern tip of the Aegean coast with the confidence of a place that knows exactly what it is — irresistibly beautiful, deeply historic, and completely intoxicating.
dest_bodrum.exp_text1: The whitewashed town tumbles down to a harbour guarded by the magnificent Castle of St. Peter, its twin bays framing views that have inspired poets and painters for centuries. By day, the Aegean shimmers in colours that shift from aquamarine to deepest sapphire as private gulets thread between hidden coves.
dest_bodrum.exp_text2: By evening, Bodrum transforms into one of the eastern Mediterranean's most sophisticated social scenes — rooftop bars, candlelit courtyard restaurants, and a marina alive with the gentle clink of mooring lines and the murmur of many languages.
dest_bodrum.exp_text3: Ibtiseme Tour curates Bodrum at its finest — private yacht charters to secluded bays, boutique hotel reservations at the peninsula's most coveted addresses, and VIP access to experiences that the ordinary visitor cannot reach.
dest_bodrum.hl_c1_desc: Commission your own gulet and chart a course through the Bodrum Peninsula's most spectacular bays — anchoring in crystalline coves accessible only by sea, dining on deck as the stars multiply overhead.
dest_bodrum.hl_c2_desc: Built by the Knights Hospitaller in the 15th century from the stones of the Mausoleum of Halicarnassus — one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World — this fortress dominates Bodrum's harbour with timeless authority.
dest_bodrum.hl_c3_desc: The marina is Bodrum's beating heart — a promenade of superyachts and traditional gulets, waterfront restaurants serving Aegean mezze, and an atmosphere of effortless, sun-soaked sophistication.
dest_bodrum.hl_c4_desc: From clifftop retreats with infinity pools suspended above the Aegean to intimate whitewashed villas hidden in olive groves, Bodrum's accommodation offers some of the most desirable luxury stays in all of Turkey.
dest_bodrum.hl_c5_desc: Fresh octopus grilled over charcoal, Aegean herb salads, olive oil pressed from century-old trees, and meze that unfolds course by course over long golden evenings — Bodrum's culinary culture is a destination in itself.
dest_bodrum.hl_c6_desc: The Greek island of Kos lies minutes away by speedboat. Karada Island's thermal springs bubble up beneath the sea. And countless uninhabited Aegean islets await those who want to feel, for a few hours, utterly alone in paradise.
dest_bodrum.cta_title:
Let Us Plan Your
Perfect Bodrum Journey
dest_bodrum.cta_desc: Our specialists will design your complete Bodrum experience — private yacht bookings, curated boutique hotel reservations, VIP marina access, and island excursions tailored entirely to your desires.

dest_antalya.hero_sub: Where the Taurus Mountains plunge into the crystal waters of the Mediterranean, Antalya delivers a combination of ancient history, glittering beaches, and resort luxury that is simply unmatched.
dest_antalya.exp_intro: Antalya is Turkey's jewel on the Mediterranean — a city where Roman triumphal arches stand beside boutique harbour restaurants, and five-star resort pools overlook the same cerulean sea that ancient civilisations once sailed across.
dest_antalya.exp_text1: The old town of Kaleiçi winds through Roman walls, Ottoman mansions, and Byzantine churches, each street a chapter in a history stretching back over two millennia. Beyond the old city, Antalya's coastline unfolds in a series of spectacular bays — from the iconic pebble beaches of Lara and Konyaaltı to secluded coves accessible only by private boat.
dest_antalya.exp_text2: The region's world-class resorts offer every conceivable luxury, while the surrounding mountains provide dramatic backdrops for those who want to venture beyond the shore.
dest_antalya.exp_text3: Ibtiseme Tour arranges your Antalya experience with the precision and care it deserves — private airport transfers, exclusive resort reservations, guided historical tours, and bespoke blue voyage itineraries.
dest_antalya.hl_c1_desc: Sink into the shores of Lara Beach, Konyaaltı, or Kaputaş — where the sea glows turquoise and the water is so clear you can trace the outlines of ancient amphora on the seabed below.
dest_antalya.hl_c2_desc: Step inside Roman walls into a labyrinth of Ottoman-era mansions, Byzantine ruins, and narrow stone streets alive with the fragrance of jasmine. One of Turkey's most beautifully preserved historic quarters.
dest_antalya.hl_c3_desc: Perge, Aspendos, and Termessos stand as monuments to Rome's imperial reach. The theatre at Aspendos remains so well preserved it still hosts international opera performances beneath open skies.
dest_antalya.hl_c4_desc: Antalya hosts some of the Mediterranean's most spectacular five-star resorts — sprawling properties with private beaches, infinity pools, world-class spas, and culinary experiences that rival any capital city.
dest_antalya.hl_c5_desc: Charter a private gulet and sail the turquoise bays, anchor in secluded coves inaccessible by road, and watch the sun set behind limestone cliffs while the cook prepares fresh catch on deck.
dest_antalya.hl_c6_desc: The Lower Düden Waterfall plunges directly into the sea from a cliff face — a sight of extraordinary natural drama. Accessible by boat for a perspective you will remember for a lifetime.
dest_antalya.cta_title:
Let Us Plan Your
Perfect Antalya Journey
dest_antalya.cta_desc: Our specialists are on hand to design your perfect Antalya escape — luxury resort bookings, private guided historical tours, bespoke boat charters, and VIP transfers from the moment you land.

dest_pamukkale.hero_sub: Pamukkale is one of those rare places that photographs cannot prepare you for. Pure white travertine terraces cascading down a hillside, filled with thermal mineral waters — a natural wonder that has drawn visitors since antiquity.
dest_pamukkale.exp_intro: Over millennia, calcium-rich thermal waters have sculpted Pamukkale's hillside into one of earth's most extraordinary sights — a cascade of snow-white terraces, each one a natural pool of warm, mineral-rich water glowing blue against blazing white calcite.
dest_pamukkale.exp_text1: The name means Cotton Castle, and the name is perfect. At the summit, the ancient city of Hierapolis crowns the hill, its ruins and necropolis spread across the plateau in remarkable preservation. And between the ancient stones, Cleopatra's Antique Pool invites you to swim in thermal waters among fallen Roman columns — an experience available nowhere else on the planet.
dest_pamukkale.exp_text2: Ibtiseme Tour brings you to Pamukkale at its most magical — early morning visits when the terraces glow in the soft light before the crowds arrive, private archaeological tours of Hierapolis, and comfortable overnight stays at the best accommodation the region offers.
dest_pamukkale.hl_c1_desc: Wade barefoot through pools of warm, mineral-rich water on blindingly white calcite terraces — a sensation and spectacle that no photograph, however beautiful, can fully convey. This must be experienced to be understood.
dest_pamukkale.hl_c2_desc: Swim in 36-degree thermal waters amongst submerged Roman columns — a pool said to have been gifted to Cleopatra by Mark Antony. The most extraordinary bathing experience in the ancient world, still available today.
dest_pamukkale.hl_c3_desc: Crowning the hilltop above the terraces, the Greco-Roman city of Hierapolis preserves streets, temples, and a magnificent theatre in exceptional condition. Founded in the 2nd century BC, it speaks loudly across the centuries.
dest_pamukkale.hl_c4_desc: The vast Hierapolis necropolis — one of the largest ancient burial grounds in Anatolia — contains over a thousand tombs, sarcophagi, and mausoleums stretching across the landscape in haunting, beautiful profusion.
dest_pamukkale.hl_c5_desc: A short drive from Pamukkale, Laodicea was one of the seven churches of Revelation and a major commercial hub of the ancient world. Its ongoing excavations reveal new discoveries with each passing season.
dest_pamukkale.hl_c6_desc: Nearby Kaklık Cave harbours its own miniature version of Pamukkale's thermal formations — stalactite-hung chambers above steaming thermal waters, a secret wonder known only to those who venture beyond the main sites.
dest_pamukkale.cta_title:
Let Us Plan Your
Perfect Pamukkale Journey
dest_pamukkale.cta_desc: Our specialists will arrange your complete Pamukkale experience — timed terrace visits, Cleopatra's Pool access, private Hierapolis tours, and seamless transfers between Antalya, Istanbul, or wherever your journey begins.

dest_trabzon.hero_sub: Far removed from the well-trodden tourist trail, Trabzon offers Turkey at its most raw and magnificent — a world of misty monasteries, impossibly lush highlands, and a coastline that feels untouched by time.
dest_trabzon.exp_intro: While the rest of the world rushes to Istanbul and the Aegean coast, those who truly know Turkey seek out the north. Trabzon and the surrounding Black Sea region possess a beauty different from anywhere else in the country — deeper, greener, wilder.
dest_trabzon.exp_text1: The mountains rise steeply from the water, draped in forest so dense and vivid it seems almost impossibly alive. Carved into sheer cliffsides above forested valleys, Sümela Monastery has been a place of contemplation and wonder for over fifteen centuries.
dest_trabzon.exp_text2: Highland plateaus like Ayder offer an escape into a world of wooden chalets, thermal springs, and the sound of rushing mountain streams — a world that many visitors find unexpectedly moving in its purity and stillness.
dest_trabzon.exp_text3: Ibtiseme Tour opens this extraordinary region to you with the comfort and exclusivity it deserves — private transfers through mountain roads, curated highland lodge accommodations, and expert local guides who know every hidden viewpoint and forgotten path.
dest_trabzon.hl_c1_desc: Clinging to a vertical cliff face 1,200 metres above sea level, Sümela is among the most dramatic religious sites in the world. Founded in 386 AD, its frescoed interior and impossible setting command complete awe.
dest_trabzon.hl_c2_desc: Ascend into the clouds to reach Ayder — a lush alpine village where wooden houses perch above rushing rivers, thermal baths beckon at dusk, and the air carries the scent of pine and wild herbs.
dest_trabzon.hl_c3_desc: A mirror-still mountain lake encircled by forested peaks and framed by a wooden mosque — Uzungöl has become one of Turkey's most beloved natural landscapes, and its beauty is every bit as powerful in person.
dest_trabzon.hl_c4_desc: Trabzon's coastline is unlike anything in the Mediterranean — dramatic, wild, and bracingly authentic. Rocky cliffs, dark sand beaches, and the constant presence of a sea that has shaped civilisations for millennia.
dest_trabzon.hl_c5_desc: The Black Sea region possesses one of Turkey's most distinctive culinary traditions — anchovy dishes prepared thirty different ways, cornbread, wild greens, and butter-rich pastries. Dining here is a revelation.
dest_trabzon.hl_c6_desc: The terraced tea gardens of nearby Rize cascade down the hills in endless rows of emerald — the source of Turkey's beloved çay. A landscape as soothing to look at as the tea itself is to drink.
dest_trabzon.cta_title:
Let Us Plan Your
Perfect Trabzon Journey
dest_trabzon.cta_desc: Our specialists will craft your complete Trabzon experience — private highland transfers, curated lodge accommodations, Sümela Monastery visits, and exclusive access to the region's most breathtaking natural landscapes.
